title: Monties Cycles and Sport: Always aiming to stay on top of our game
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Monties Cycles and Sport is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Monties Cycles and Sport is proud to be the oldest cycle and sport shop in Mossel Bay. As a cycle shop since 1985, our team will walk that extra mile for all our valued customers from across South Africa and beyond.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Monties Cycles and Sport is proud to be the oldest cycle and sport shop in Mossel Bay. As a cycle shop since 1985, our team will walk that extra mile for all our valued customers from across South Africa and beyond."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We are proud to win this award for the second year in a row! Thank you to all our customers and voters for your ongoing support and votes! We appreciate each and every one of you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is our mission to always try to stay on top of our game. No job too small or too big!","html":"It is our mission to always try to stay on top of our game. No job too small or too big!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A special thanks to Darren and Xabiso who ply their trade in our fully equipped workshop.","html":"A special thanks to Darren and Xabiso who ply their trade in our fully equipped workshop."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Darren, our head mechanic: always a smile on his face, always eager to learn and solve a problem and part of the team since 2017. He treats your bicycle with respect.","html":"Darren, our head mechanic: always a smile on his face, always eager to learn and solve a problem and part of the team since 2017. He treats your bicycle with respect."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Xabiso: the youngest member of our team since 2021. He is an all-rounder and knows his sport and sports gear. Xabiso can serve you in Afrikaans, English or Xhosa.","html":"Xabiso: the youngest member of our team since 2021. He is an all-rounder and knows his sport and sports gear. Xabiso can serve you in Afrikaans, English or Xhosa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit Monties Cycles and Sport as a client and leave as a friend! We are here to serve.","html":"Visit Monties Cycles and Sport as a client and leave as a friend! We are here to serve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"- Luther and Marius van der Mescht","html":"- Luther and Marius van der Mescht"},{"type":"list","items":["Visit us: 62 Marsh Street, Mossel Bay","Call us: 044 691 2828","Email: [email protected]","Website: www.montiescycles.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
